$comment: scripts/CinnabarGym.asm CinnabarGymBlaineText — challenge -> OPP_BLAINE -> VOLCANOBADGE + BEAT_BLAINE + the gym's trainers defeated (gh #109) -> TM38. A full bag forfeits the TM for good (gh #174).

then.text:
FIRE BLAST is the
ultimate fire
technique! Don't waste it on
water POKéMON!

else.text:
Hah! I am BLAINE! I
am the LEADER of
CINNABAR GYM! My fiery POKéMON
will incinerate
all challengers! Hah! You better
have BURN HEAL!

then.text:
I have
burnt out! You have earned
the VOLCANOBADGE!

Hah! The VOLCANOBADGE
heightens the
SPECIAL abilities
of your POKéMON! Here, you can
have this too!

TM38 contains
FIRE BLAST! Teach it to fire-
type POKéMON like
CHARMELEON or
PONYTA!
